title: gentiana aspera var. calycinoidea
intro: Gentiana aspera var. calycinoidea, also known as the rough gentian, is a plant species in the gentian family native to the Himalayas and the Tibetan Plateau. The plant has been traditionally used in medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Gentiana aspera var. calycinoidea include its ability to treat digestive issues, respiratory problems, and skin conditions, as well as its potential to reduce fever and alleviate pain. Gentiana aspera var. calycinoidea can be prepared as a tea or tincture for medicinal use, and its root and leaves can be used in herbal remedies.
